data.text: of the color whose hue is that of the clear sky: of the color blue
examples: The house is blue with white shutters.
the blue haze of tobacco smoke
… the ladies were very blue and well-informed …
As has become increasingly clear over the past few general elections, with their red states and blue states, an American Presidential campaign is no longer truly national.

data.text: discolored by or as if by bruising
examples: The house is blue with white shutters.
the blue haze of tobacco smoke
… the ladies were very blue and well-informed …
As has become increasingly clear over the past few general elections, with their red states and blue states, an American Presidential campaign is no longer truly national.

data.text: a color whose hue is that of the clear sky or that of the portion of the color spectrum lying between green and violet
examples: the horse that won the blue =blue ribbon
… is bartered … like a stack of blues =blue chips in a Reno casino.
praised the writings of her fellow blues

One cannot have a single quark on its own because it would have a color (red, green, or blue). Instead, a red quark has to be joined to a green and a blue quark by a "string" of gluons (red + green + blue = white). Such a triplet constitutes a proton or a neutron.

data.text: a pigment or dye that colors blue
examples: the horse that won the blue =blue ribbon
… is bartered … like a stack of blues =blue chips in a Reno casino.
praised the writings of her fellow blues

data.text: to make (something) blue in color: such as
examples: Last, the generation of the grandmothers, in immaculately blued hair …
the blued barrel of the gun
Between banks shrouded with snow, the river gleamed darkly, like blued steel with gold chips of sunlight dancing on each riffle.

data.text: to dye, tint, or paint (something) blue
examples: Last, the generation of the grandmothers, in immaculately blued hair …
the blued barrel of the gun
Between banks shrouded with snow, the river gleamed darkly, like blued steel with gold chips of sunlight dancing on each riffle.

data.text: to heat (iron or steel) to about 550 to 600°F (288 to 316°C) so that it acquires a bluish protective coating
examples: Last, the generation of the grandmothers, in immaculately blued hair …
the blued barrel of the gun
Between banks shrouded with snow, the river gleamed darkly, like blued steel with gold chips of sunlight dancing on each riffle.

data.text: a Mexican agave (Agave tequilana) that has bluish- to greenish-gray swordlike leaves with spiny margins and is typically cultivated for the production of tequila and sometimes grown as an ornamental

a widely publicized bulletin that alerts law enforcement agencies, the media, and the public to the ongoing search for a person suspected of killing, seriously wounding, or seeking to kill or seriously wound a law enforcement officer in connection with the officer's duties
examples: A Blue Alert was issued … as officials searched for a man charged in connection with the death of a Houston-area police officer.
Blue Alerts can also be issued when a suspect poses an imminent and credible threat to law enforcement …
Blue alerts also are used when an officer goes missing while on duty and the circumstances around their disappearance cause concern for the officer's safety.

data.text: an infant with cyanosis usually from a congenital heart defect in which venous and arterial blood are mingled
membership in a noble or socially prominent family
a member of a noble or socially prominent family
a register especially of socially prominent persons
a book of specialized information often published under government auspices
a blue-covered booklet used for writing examinations
a large bluish catfish (Ictalurus furcatus) of the Mississippi River valley that may weigh over 100 pounds (45 kilograms)
a cheese marked with veins of greenish-blue mold
examples: Where does the blue in blue cheese come from? Mold. But it's harmless mold, so enjoy!
The beef was a perfect medium-rare, and the sauce was robust, ideal for the meat with just the right touch of bleu cheese.
